description:
Create a multi-day dive safari trip record named 'Komodo Safari 2023' for a liveaboard in Komodo National Park, Indonesia (Location: 'Labuan Bajo, Indonesia'). The record must include the following three dive entries:

Dive 1 (Crystal Rock): March 5, 2023, 09:00, 52 min, 28m max depth, Nitrox 32% O2, 12L cylinder at 232 bar, buddy 'Wayan Surya', tags 'current' and 'drift', notes 'Strong current from the north. Incredible school of barracuda at 15m. Drifted along the pinnacle wall.'

Dive 2 (Castle Rock): March 5, 2023, 14:00, 48 min, 25m max depth, Air (21% O2), 12L cylinder at 232 bar, buddy 'Wayan Surya', tags 'current', notes 'Mantas spotted at cleaning station on the north side.'

Dive 3 (Batu Bolong): March 6, 2023, 08:30, 45 min, 32m max depth, Nitrox 32% O2, 12L cylinder at 232 bar, buddy 'Adi Pratama', tags 'deep' and 'wall', notes 'Pristine wall dive with soft corals. Napoleon wrasse at safety stop.'
